title: Lack of automated tests
impact: Regressions in core database or recovery logic could go unnoticed during updates
recommended_action: Create basic test suite with pytest under a new tests/ directory

title: Lack of CI/CD workflows
impact: PRs and commits are not automatically tested or linted
recommended_action: Create a basic GitHub Actions workflow to run pytest

title: Deprecated --use-model CLI parameter
recommended_action: Keep for backward compatibility but plan for future removal

title: Obsolete rebuild_opencode.sh script
impact: Redundant script that doesn't solve actual DB bloat and might confuse users
recommended_action: Document as deprecated or remove it

title: SQLite transaction rollback and connection leaks
evidence: ocman.py lines 3926 and 4122 lack rollback on exception and finally close conn
impact: Database locks or leaks open connections on query failures
recommended_action: Wrap operations in context manager or try/except/finally blocks to ensure rollback and connection closure

title: Textual background thread polling intervals never stopped
evidence: orsession/app.py lines 132 908 and 1791 call set_interval without stopping the timer
impact: Polling continues indefinitely after thread completes wasting events
recommended_action: Stop the textual Timer object when thread is done or fails

title: Path traversal risk during session deletion
evidence: ocman.py lines 4009 and 4315 build file path directly from session ID
impact: Could delete files outside target directory if database session ID contains path traversal patterns
recommended_action: Sanitize session ID or verify that resolved file path is inside storage directory

title: No command timeout on export in ocman.py
impact: CLI tool may hang indefinitely if opencode export hangs
recommended_action: Add a timeout parameter to the export execution inside ocman.py

title: Missing CLI arguments in README.md
evidence: README.md All Arguments table is missing days clean-orphans db delete dry-run force and compact
impact: Users might not discover database cleaning or session deletion arguments
recommended_action: Update the README.md table and usage examples

title: Editable installation mode does not track ocman.py module
evidence: pyproject.toml editable install only lists orsession package
impact: Developer edits to ocman.py are not reflected in installed ocman script until reinstalled
recommended_action: Document build/reinstall instructions or verify module inclusion strategy in pyproject.toml
